author: Debbie Carey
content: I can not recommend this guy enough!!!  I used him for the first time today, the sockets kept tripping In my daughters room where there is a lot of medical equipment.  He was round in 20 mins, sorted the problem but also stayed after to make sure it was definitely fixed!!  He’s a lovely local lad working within his community.  Then to top it all off he’s VERY reasonably priced too.  Thankyou Ashley
